brand.name: Sejal Creation
brand.description: Premium E-commerce and Bridal Jewellery Rental Services

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-medium
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-medium

layout_modes.marketing: Asymmetrical grids, generous whitespace, overlapping elements
layout_modes.dashboard: Dense, crisp borders, solid backgrounds (no glass for data clarity), max 4px radius

surfaces_and_shadows.cards: bg-[#FAF9F6] border border-[#E5E0D8] shadow-sm transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-md hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50
surfaces_and_shadows.navigation: Sticky header with crystal glassmorphism effect; Mobile bottom navigation fixed at bottom with solid background and top border

buttons.primary: bg-[#6E0D25] text-white hover:bg-[#800000] transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-wider text-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#D4AF37] text-[#1A1814] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-white transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-wider text-sm
buttons.whatsapp_floating: fixed bottom-20 sm:bottom-8 right-4 sm:right-8 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform z-50 flex items-center justify-center

components_strategy.inputs: bg-transparent border-b border-[#D4AF37]/50 focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-0 rounded-none px-0 py-2 placeholder-[#7A7569]
components_strategy.product_card: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white border border-[#E5E0D8] p-4 flex flex-col
components_strategy.badges: bg-[#F5F3ED] text-[#6E0D25] text-xs uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-1 font-medium border border-[#E5E0D8]

animations_and_interactions.hover: Subtle scale up (1.02) for product images, border color shift to gold, background tint for list items
animations_and_interactions.page_transition: Fade in with slight upward translation
animations_and_interactions.product_zoom: On hover, the product image should scale to 1.1 inside a hidden overflow container
animations_and_interactions.marquee: Use for 'Premium Collections | Bridal Sets | Traditional' in a slow, elegant, low-contrast serif ribbon

hero_images.description: Woman in red and gold sari dress with heavy bridal jewellery
Luxurious Indian bridal jewelry with gold necklaces and bangles elegantly laid out on a rich red saree.

specific_features.checkout: PIN code based COD check (Only available for 443101), Manual QR payment upload for others
specific_features.rental: Display security deposit distinctly, calendar date selection for rental duration
specific_features.admin: Dashboard with KPI cards, charts (use Recharts), order verification, product CRUD, and rental management.
specific_features.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette: Ivory base, deep gold, maroon accents. DO NOT use generic blue or purple.
Use Cinzel (or a similar elegant serif) for all headings. Ensure body text uses Outfit.
Implement a mobile bottom navigation bar with icons for Home, Categories, Rental, Cart, Profile.
Add a sticky WhatsApp floating button on all pages routing to +91 7262080228.
For the E-commerce gallery and product pages, employ generous whitespace and subtle borders.
Implement product zoom functionality on product detail pages.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to all interactive elements for robust testing.
